# SLSA Build Level — SZL Holdings · killinchu

**Current honest status: SLSA Build L2 (achieved, empirically verified).**

Previously declared **L1 (honest)** — provenance existed but was generated on
non-hosted builders. The published `ghcr.io/szl-holdings/killinchu` container image
(tag `uds-v0.2.0`) is now built on a **hosted GitHub Actions builder** and ships a
**signed in-toto SLSA provenance v1** attestation generated by
`actions/attest-build-provenance@v2` (Sigstore keyless: Fulcio cert + Rekor /
GitHub trust-domain timestamp), pushed to the registry alongside the image
(`push-to-registry: true`). Producing workflow run: [26896047715](https://github.com/szl-holdings/killinchu/actions/runs/26896047715).

| SLSA Build level | Requirement | SZL status (killinchu) |
|---|---|---|
| L1 | Provenance exists (may be unsigned) | ✅ Met |
| **L2** | **Signed provenance from a hosted build platform, verifiable downstream** | **🟢 Achieved (GitHub trust domain).** Empirically verified: signed in-toto SLSA provenance v1 over the image, OIDC issuer + source repo confirmed, codeSigning EKU present. Private repo ⇒ verify via `gh attestation verify`. |
| L3 | Hardened, isolated builder; signing keys inaccessible to build steps | ⬜ Not claimed (requires a hardened, isolated build environment) |

## Evidence

- Build + attest workflow: `.github/workflows/ghcr-build-push.yml`
  (`actions/attest-build-provenance@v2`, `attestations: write`, `id-token: write`,
  `push-to-registry: true`).
- Predicate type: `https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1` (in-toto DSSE).
- Builder: GitHub-hosted Actions runner; OIDC issuer
  `https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com`.

## Verify (downstream)

```bash
# killinchu is a PRIVATE repo: its build attestation is issued under the GitHub
# Fulcio trust domain (CN=Fulcio Intermediate l2, O=GitHub, Inc.) with an
# RFC3161 signed timestamp, not the public Sigstore Rekor log. Verify with
# GitHub's native tooling (which knows that trust domain):
gh attestation verify oci://ghcr.io/szl-holdings/killinchu:uds-v0.2.0 \
  --owner szl-holdings
```

Verified image digest: `sha256:48bab05a8124943c880b24ecd949e0baeaa1c71d5d02155d087f5e8d4c822606`.
Trust domain: GitHub Actions OIDC issuer `https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com`,
source repo `szl-holdings/killinchu`, predicate `https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1`,
codeSigning EKU. (Private repo, so no public-Rekor index — this is expected and
honest; public slsa-verifier targets the public log only.)

L2 = hosted build platform (GitHub Actions) + signed provenance available to
consumers. **L3 is not claimed.**
